content.value: Choose a target within 4 spaces or yourself. That creature has advantage on agility rolls. If the target fails a defense roll the spell ends after making the following attack against the attacker: Intelligence vs. willpower / d6 damage that ignores armor.
Enhance: Attack an additional creature adjacent to the creature with the shield.

Until the spell ends, any time an enemy creature within line of sight makes an attack, you may spend 1 mana to give that creature disadvantage. If their attack misses, they sustain 1d6 damage that ignores armor. You cannot cast other spells while this spell is active. You may choose to end this spell at any time.

Choose a space within 10 spaces, no line of sight required. Until the end of the next round, make the following attack against every enemy creature the first time it activates within 1 space of that space: Intelligence vs. willpower / d6 damage. The spell ends if you move or take damage. Creatures hit by this spell cannot make attacks during the activation in which they were hit.
Enhance: Add 1 space to the radius of the blizzard
Enhance: Double the range of the spell

Change the physical appearance of a willing creature into the appearance of another creature of the same race for one hour. Only the look of their physical body changes, not their clothes or other items. All their characteristics and stats remain the same.
Enhance: Change into the appearance of a different humanoid race
Enhance: Change into the appearance of an animal
Time stops momentarily. While time is frozen you may take 1 major action. If any attacks are made while time is frozen, the spell ends immediately, and time resumes as normal.
Enhance: Extend the duration such that you can take an additional major action. Additional actions are lost if attacks are made while time is frozen.
Enhance: Add 1 target within 8 spaces to the spell effect.

Choose a space within 10 spaces. Make an intelligence vs. willpower attack against each creature within 1 space of the target space. If they fail, they take 1d6 damage. If they succeed, they take half damage.
Enhance: Double the range of the spell
Enhance: Increase the radius by 1 space
Enhance: Increase the damage by 1d6. This enhancement cannot be taken more times than the previous enhancement that increases the radius.
Choose two adjacent targets within 10 spaces and make the following attack against each target: Intelligence vs. willpower / d10 damage
Enhance: Double the range of the spell

Every time your initiative card comes up you may spend 1 mana to make an intelligence vs. agility attack with a range of 10 that does 1d12 damage and moves the target 6 spaces directly toward you. Once you choose not to make the attack, the spell ends.
Enhance: Double the range of the spell and move the target an extra 3 spaces

Draw a line between spaces that is two space edges long. All adjacent spaces must be within 10 spaces of you. Any creature must make a strength vs. intelligence roll against you in order to move or make a melee attack across the line. Any creature that attempts to move or make a melee attack across the line and fails takes 1d12 damage. At the start of each round roll a d4. If you roll a 1, the spell ends. The force field reaches 10ft into the air.
Enhance: Double the length and height of the force field
Enhance: Increase the size of the die to see if the spell ends by 1, to a maximum of d12
Create up to 5 pounds of any common substance such as water, wood, rock, clothing, metal, or food. This spell cannot be used to create weapons or armor. This spell can only be cast once per day.

Until the spell ends, put a d4 on this spell any time you cast another spell. On any initiative card, you may choose to end this spell. When the spell ends, assign the dice on this spell to creatures within 10 spaces of you as damage that ignores armor.
Enhance: Increase the size of the dice by one up to a maximum of a d12

Target one creature within 10 spaces. They are invisible but still make sounds. This gives them advantage on stealth checks if they are wearing metal armor, or +5 on stealth checks if they are not wearing armor. If they make a melee attack, they may make a stealth vs. agility attack instead of their normal attack. Roll a d4 at the start of every round, if you roll a 1, the spell ends.
Enhance: Increase the size of the die to see if the spell ends by 1, to a maximum of d12
Enhance: Double the number of targets included in the spell
Enhance: Double the range of the spell
Choose 1 willing target within 10 spaces. The target floats off of the ground for 1 minute. If they are pushed, then they glide in the direction of being pushed unless something stops them.
Enhance: Increase the duration of the spell effect by 10 times.
Enhance: Propel the targets in a chosen direction at a speed of 6 spaces per round. Choose to stop the target at any time.
Choose a target within 10 spaces. That target takes 1d4 damage that ignores damage reduction.
Enhance: Double the range of the spell

Choose a space within 10 spaces to be the beacon. For the rest of the encounter, every time an ally is targeted by an attack while within 2 spaces of the beacon, add a d4 to this spell (after the attack is completed). At any time, you may spend 1 mana to give one or more d4s from this card to yourself or an ally to add to their skill, agility, intelligence, or willpower roll. As a major action you may make an intelligence vs. willpower attack and spend the dice on this card as damage. If you miss this attack, you deal half damage to the target and the spell ends.
Enhance: Double the range of the spell
Enhance: Increase the size of the dice by 1, to a maximum of d12
Enhance: Increase the beacon range by 1

Choose a target within 10 spaces and make an intelligence vs. willpower attack against the creature that does 1d6 damage. On each subsequent enemy initiative card, you can spend 1 mana for each activating creature to make this ice strike attack before any creatures activates on that initiative card. You may choose to spend mana to attack 1 or more of the activating creatures. Any creature hit with this spell may not make major movements until the next round. Once you choose not to spend mana to continue the spell, the spell ends.
Enhance: Add 1d6 to the damage of attacks made with this spell

Target one empty space within 10 spaces and summon into that space a level 1 beast as a bear, cat, snake, spider, wolf, or other creature that the game master allows that lasts until the end of the encounter. The creature has 1 health.
Enhance: The creature has their normal health.
Enhance: The creatures can be 1 level higher

While this spell is active, on your initiative you may spend one mana to place a d4 on this spell and roll a dice of the same size. If you roll lower than the number of dice on this spell, the spell is cast. When casting the spell, draw a line from the center of your space to the center of a space 10 spaces away. Assign the dice on this spell as damage to the creatures on or near the line as damage that ignores damage reduction. Creatures closer to you must have more dice assigned than creatures further away.
Enhance: Double the range of the spell
Enhance: Increase the size of the dice by one up to a maximum of a d12
Choose 1 willing target within 10 spaces and instantly teleport them up to 10 spaces within line of sight.
Enhance: Teleport the targets up to 10 times further
Enhance: Teleport the targets even to places that you do not have line of sight to. You must have been to the location before.
Draw 3 cards from the initiative deck. Reorder them and then place them back on top of the initiative deck.
Enhance: Choose 1 card to place in the discard pile
Enhance: Take 1 card from the initiative discard pile and put it back into the initiative deck in any order along with the cards you drew

Any rune spell that places a rune must follow these rules: No space can contain multiple runes. Runes are always destroyed at the end of an encounter unless stated otherwise. Any single roll can only be affected by one rune at a time. If a spell says to use or consume a rune, the rune goes away after that action.
Choose a target within 4 spaces. You and the target have advantage against one another for the remainder of the encounter.
Enhance: Make an immediate melee attack against the target if the target is within range of a melee attack.

Choose a space within 4 spaces to contain the rune of confusion. At the end of the current round, choose 1 enemy within 4 spaces of the rune and make an apposed willpower check against the creature. If you win the roll, remove one of that creatures’ initiative cards from the deck for the next round. The card cannot be a bonus action card.
Enhance: Place one additional rune. Each rune must target a creature with a different initiative.

Choose a space within 4 spaces to contain the rune of conveyance. For the rest of the encounter, any friendly creature within line of sight of the rune may cast a spell as though they were standing in the space of the rune.

Choose a space within 4 spaces to contain the rune of curses. Any enemy creature within 4 spaces of the rune gains disadvantage on an agility, willpower, skill, or intelligence roll. If that creature fails on the roll, the rune is consumed.

Choose a space within 4 spaces to contain the rune of the mountain. Any creature must successfully make a strength vs. willpower roll against you in order to move into that space. Creatures can jump or fly over the rune as long as they remain 10 ft or higher in the air.
Enhance: Gain advantage on your willpower roll when creatures attempt to move into the space

Choose a space within 4 spaces to contain the rune of protection. Any friendly creature within 4 spaces of the rune can choose to gain advantage on an agility or willpower roll. If that creature succeeds on the roll, the rune is consumed.
Choose a space within 4 spaces to contain the rune of redemption. Any friendly creature within 4 spaces of the rune that misses an attack may use the rune to reroll the attack.

Choose a space within 4 spaces to contain the rune of stone shield. Any friendly creature within 4 spaces of the rune that is hit by a ranged attack gains 2 toughness against that attack. Any creature may target the rune with a melee attack to destroy it. The rune has agility 0. If the rune is hit with an attack it is destroyed.
Enhance: Increase the toughness gained by 2

Choose a space within 4 spaces to place the rune of hope. Any friendly creature within 4 spaces of the rune is reduced to 0 hit points immediately gains 1d6 health and may take a major action. Each time a friendly creature uses the rune, you may choose to destroy the rune. All enemy creatures within 4 spaces of the rune must make an apposed willpower check against you. If they fail, they must make a major movement directly away from you (avoiding dangerous objects, cliffs, and such).
Enhance: Increase the health regained by 1d6
Enhance: Gain advantage on willpower checks associated to this spell
Choose a space within 4 spaces to contain the rune of the deep. Any enemy creature within 4 spaces of the rune has one less space of major and minor movement speed, to a minimum of 1.
Enhance: Decrease the speed of enemy creatures by 1 additional space

Choose a space within 4 spaces to contain the rune of the flame forge. You may target any enemy that makes a melee attack within 4 spaces of the rune with a flame forge attack. Flame forge is a willpower vs. willpower attack that does 1d6 damage. After you hit with a flame forge attack, the rune is consumed.
Enhance: Increase the damage of the flame forge attack by 1d6

Choose a space within 4 spaces to contain the rune of the well. Any friendly creature that receives healing within 4 spaces of the rune may reroll any dice associated with that healing spell and keep the second result.

Choose a space within 4 spaces to contain the rune of the whisper. You may target any enemy that casts a spell within 4 spaces of the rune with a rune whisper attack. Rune whisper is a willpower vs. willpower attack that does 1d12 damage. After you hit with a rune whisper attack, the rune is consumed.
Enhance: Increase the damage of the rune whisper attack by 1d12

Choose a space within 4 spaces to contain the rune of valor. Any friendly creature within 4 spaces of the rune can choose to gain advantage on a skill or intelligence roll. If that creature succeeds on the roll, the rune is consumed.

Pick up a stone. Choose any willing creature, including yourself, to cast a spell and enchant the stone with the spell. Track how much mana was cast with the spell. At any time, you may use the stone to cast the associated spell as a consumable, following the same rules as scrolls. The stone lasts until the end of your next long rest.

Choose a space within 4 spaces to place the ward rune. Any time a friendly creature is damaged by a spell and is within 4 spaces of the ward rune, you may consume the ward rune to reduce the damage of the spell by half.

Make a willpower vs. willpower check against an adjacent animal. If you win the roll, give the animal a command that it must follow, which cannot include making an attack. The command lasts for 1 round.
Enhance: The targets may make an attack
Enhance: Double the number of targets
Enhance: Double the duration of the spell

Until the end of the encounter you may spend a minor action and 1 mana to summon a dryad. When summoned, all the dryads can move 6 spaces and make an attack. A dryad is destroyed if hit with an attack. The dryads last until the end of the encounter and may make a major action on the spell initiative card. All the dryads’ stats are 0 and they do 1d6 damage.
Enhance: Increase the dryads stats by 1
Enhance: Increase the size of the damage dice by 1 to a max of d12

Choose 2 targets within 6 spaces. That target is grabbed by roots and cannot move until the end of the round. The target may take a major action to make a strength vs. willpower check to break free of the roots. If they fail to break free, they take 1d4 damage.
Enhance: Double the number of targets
Enhance: Increase the size of the damage die by 1, to a maximum of d12

Choose a space within 6 spaces. A circle of mushrooms appears with a radius of 1 space, centered on the chosen space. Any creature within the fairy ring can reroll rolls from potions and healing spells. The fairy ring lasts for 1 day. When you cast fairy ring, any active fairy ring spells are ended. Any creature that can take a major action to destroy the fair ring.
Enhance: Double the duration of the spell

Choose a target within 6 spaces and line of sight and make an intelligence vs. willpower attack against the creature. If you hit, the target takes 1d6 damage. Toughness from metal armor is ignored. After each attack performed with this spell, you may make the same attack against another creature within 6 spaces and line of sight of the previously attacked creature. Reduce the damage of each attack by 1d6. Once you have no damage dice left to perform another attack, the spell ends. The spell cannot target the same creature twice.

Choose a creature within 6 spaces and make an intelligence vs. willpower attack against the creature. If you hit, the target takes 1d6 damage. If the target is wearing metal armor, their damage reduction is ignored, and they take an additional 1d6 damage.

Choose a space within 6 spaces. All spaces within 3 spaces of the chosen space are covered by a thick mist that obscures vision. Ranged attacks shooting out of the mist, into it, or through it are at disadvantage. The mist lasts for one hour or until you choose to end the effect.
Enhance: Increase the size of the mist by 3 spaces
Choose a small nonflying mammal to shapeshift into. The effect lasts for 1 hour. If you are attacked or sustain damage, you return to your normal form. You cannot make attacks while shapeshifted.
Enhance: Add 1 willing creature within 6 spaces to also shapeshift into the same creature
Enhance: Choose any small animal including flying and swimming animals
Make an intelligence vs willpower attack against all creatures within line of sight of you up to a distance of 6 spaces. Any creature that you hit skips its next initiative card.
Enhance: Increase the range by 6 spaces
Enhance: Choose one creature to be shielded from the spell

Until the end of the next round, any creature within 6 spaces that makes a major move and moves over half of their movement speed must make an agility check against your intelligence. If they fail this check, they fall prone and end their movement.
Enhance: Double the range of the spell
Choose a target within 6 spaces. Make an intelligence vs willpower attack. If it hits, do 1d6 damage for each ally adjacent to the target (max 2).
Enhance: Add 1d6 damage for each ally adjacent to the target
Enhance: Increase max adjacent allies by 1

Create a wall of thorns 1 space wide by 2 spaces long and 10ft high that blocks movement and ranged attacks. Creatures can attack the wall with a strength vs. intelligence attack to destroy a section of the wall. If they miss, they sustain 1d6 damage. Fire based attacks gain advantage to the attack roll and do double damage. The wall lasts until the end of the encounter or 1 minute, whichever is longer.
Enhance: Extend the wall by 2 spaces in a straight line
Enhance: Add 1 right angle turn in the wall
Enhance: Extend the duration of the spell effect by 10 times

Change the weather in a one-mile radius from where you are standing for one hour. You raise your arms and call out in a chant, forcing the weather to change as you design. The changes in weather are not extreme, but can be anything from sunny with no clouds, cloudy and rainy, or even an intense thunderstorm. You cannot move while the spell is active. This spell can only be cast once per week.
Enhance: Increase the radius by one mile
Enhance: Increase the duration by one mile

Place your hand on a plant such as a tree or bush and give it a command. This could be to grow in a certain direction, move a branch in a certain way in order to cover a path or hide something that is on the ground, or obscure a doorway. All plants within 1 space follow the command. The plants take 4 minutes to follow the order.
Enhance: Double the range of the spell such that all the plants within the range are affected
Enhance: Reduce the time the plants take to follow the command by half

Choose a target within 6 spaces. The target and all adjacent creatures are pushed 4 spaces in any direction. If this push would cause the creature damage, they may attempt a willpower check against your intelligence to prevent the push.
Enhance: Add 4 spaces to the distance pushed
Enhance: The target and all adjacent creatures cannot make minor move actions until the end of the round
For the remainder of the encounter all creatures that willingly move into or out of melee range of you take 1d4 damage.
Enhance: Extend the effect to adjacent allies
Choose a target within 4 spaces. That target may immediately make an attack.
Until the end of the encounter, any enemy creature within 4 spaces of you that casts a spell must spend 2 additional mana.
Choose a target within 4 spaces. That target may immediately take a major movement.
Choose a target within 4 spaces. That target may immediately take a minor movement.
Until the end of the next round, all allies that make an agility or willpower roll gain advantage if they are within 4 spaces of you when making the roll.
Enhance: Extend the range by 4 spaces
Until the end of the next round, all allies that cast a spell may add one enhancement at no mana cost. This enhancement still contributes to the maximum enhancements that they can add to the spell.
Enhance: Allies may add one additional enhancement
Enhance: Extend the range by 4 spaces
Until the end of the next round, all allies that make a melee attack gain 2 damage to their attack if they are within 4 spaces of you when making the attack.
Enhance: Extend the range by 4 spaces
Cast this spell in reaction to an enemy creature doing damage to a friendly creature. That friendly creature may make an attack against that enemy creature.
Until the end of the next round or for 1 minute, you may see your surroundings from a bird’s eye view, as though you were hundreds of feet above yourself looking down.
Enhance: Move the perspective 1 mile in any direction
Heal 1d12 damage to a touched target
Heal 1d10 damage to a target within 4 spaces
Choose one ally within 4 spaces. That ally gains the feature or heroic action of another ally within 4 spaces for the remainder of the encounter.
Choose one ally within 4 spaces. They may take a heroic action.
Enhance: Add 1 ally to the target of this spell
During the next round, all allies within 4 spaces activate on the highest initiative card.
During the next round, all allies within 4 spaces activate on the first character initiative card drawn.
Give 1d6 healing to all allies within 4 spaces

When not adventuring, characters can spend their hard-earned coins on equipment such as higher tier weapons and armor, torches, food and lodging. The mages guild can turn unidentified into one single use spell scrolls. The more unidentified scrolls that are used on a single roll the more powerful the spell. This can be risky though, because half of all rolls result in no spell scroll. The alchemist’s guild uses an alternative currency of ether with which potions can be purchased. This means that acquiring potions and scrolls does not prevent players from saving up for high tier equipment. The alchemist’s guild can even swap the spell enchantments of items.
When purchasing an item, availability is determined by the game master but is generally related to the size of the settlement. The game master can use the below table as a guideline.
Always has mundane items and sometimes has common items.
Always has common and mundane items. Sometimes will have a mages guild or alchemists guild.
Always has common and mundane items. Often has a mages guild or alchemists guild. Sometimes has artisan equipment.
Always has common items, mundane, and artisan items. Always has at least one mages guild and alchemist’s guild. Sometimes has mastercrafted equipment.
Always has common items, mundane, artisan items, and mastercrafted items. Always has multiple mages guilds and alchemist’s guilds.

Armor, shields, and weapons have higher tier artisan and mastercrafted variations. When purchasing these higher tier variations of equipment, you already have, you may pay the difference between the item you have and the next tier and retain any magic enchantments on the item.
